requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability - GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作 - GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作 - GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Kuwait has not published a single official public EVSE connector mandate that could be confirmed from official public sources as of 2026-06-14. In GCC-aligned EV charging deployments, the practical connector direction is IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC charging and Combined Charging System Combo 2 (CCS2), defined under IEC 62196-3 configuration FF, for DC fast charging. These connector requirements become mandatory when specified by MEW, a public tender, site owner, fleet operator or charge-point operator.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方公开来源确认科威特已发布单一公开EVSE接口强制规范。在GCC对标的电动汽车充电部署中，实务接口方向为交流充电采用IEC 62196 Type 2，直流快充采用IEC 62196-3 FF配置下的联合充电系统Combo 2（CCS2）。当MEW、公共招标、场地方、车队运营方或充电点运营商写入要求时，这些接口要求即成为项目强制要求。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方公開來源確認科威特已發布單一公開EVSE接口強制規範。在GCC對標的電動汽車充電部署中，實務接口方向為交流充電採用IEC 62196 Type 2，直流快充採用IEC 62196-3 FF配置下的聯合充電系統Combo 2（CCS2）。當MEW、公共招標、場地方、車隊運營方或充電點運營商寫入要求時，這些接口要求即成為項目強制要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 - AC pin and contact-tube accessories including Type 2
IEC 62196-3 - DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers including CCS2 configuration FF
IEC 61851-1 - EV conductive charging general requirements
Project-specific MEW, tender, site-owner or charge-point-operator connector specification

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 communication. GB/T 20234 connectors are physically and electrically incompatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 infrastructure. For AC, GB/T and Type 2 differ in connector gender and signalling details; for DC, GB/T 20234.3 is a different coupler geometry and communication approach from CCS2.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器及GB/T 27930通信。GB/T 20234接口与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2基础设施在物理和电气层面不兼容。交流方面，GB/T与Type 2在接口性别和信号细节上不同；直流方面，GB/T 20234.3与CCS2采用不同的耦合器几何形状和通信方式。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器及GB/T 27930通訊。GB/T 20234接口與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2基礎設施在物理和電氣層面不相容。交流方面，GB/T與Type 2在接口性別和信號細節上不同；直流方面，GB/T 20234.3與CCS2採用不同的耦合器幾何形狀和通訊方式。

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for a Kuwait project that specifies IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS2. Conversion requires coupler, cable assembly, locking, proximity pilot, control pilot, DC communication, label, spare-part and test-report redesign. Adapters should not be treated as a project-compliance substitute.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩，不适用于要求IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2的科威特项目。转换需要重新设计耦合器、电缆组件、锁止、接近导引、控制导引、直流通信、标签、备件和测试报告。转接器不应被视为项目合规接口设计的替代方案。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁，不適用於要求IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2的科威特項目。轉換需要重新設計耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止、接近導引、控制導引、直流通訊、標籤、備件和測試報告。轉接器不應被視為項目合規接口設計的替代方案。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is specified by MEW, tender, site owner, charge-point operator or fleet project; Kuwait-specific public mandate not confirmed from official public sources
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign. Confirm whether the Kuwait project requires IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC before quoting or shipping. GB/T connectors are not physically compatible with IEC 62196 vehicle inlets or charger outlets.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计。在报价或发货前，应确认科威特项目是否要求交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。GB/T接口与IEC 62196车辆接口或充电桩插座在物理上不兼容。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計。在報價或發貨前，應確認科威特項目是否要求交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。GB/T接口與IEC 62196車輛接口或充電樁插座在物理上不相容。
